title: cordia obovata
intro: Cordia obovata, also known as the Babington plum or white coral tree, is a tropical plant species in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia obovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Cordia obovata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
